steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The structure “unlikely to ______ her projection entirely BUT will extend its time frame” is decisive: delays don't eliminate the projection, they just delay it. The blank must mean “negate” or “eliminate.”

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: ”Invalidate” means to nullify or render invalid. With “entirely,” this fits perfectly: delays won't fully nullify the projection (growth still expected) but will delay it. Dispute, withdraw, and underscore don't fit how delays postpone without eliminating growth. That matches choice D — D is correct.
